name: clooks-core-hooks
description: Curated zero-config production hooks: command safety, git protection, tool hygiene, and notifications
author: codestripes-dev

no-compound-commands.description: Blocks compound bash commands (&&, ||, ;) unless prefixed with ALLOW_COMPOUND=true

no-bare-mv.description: Rewrites bare mv to git mv when possible, preserving git history

no-destructive-git.description: Blocks dangerous git operations (force push, reset --hard, checkout --, stash drop, and 9 more rules)

prefer-builtin-tools.description: Blocks bash commands that have dedicated Claude Code tools (cat→Read, grep→Grep, find→Glob, etc.)

no-auto-confirm.description: Blocks piping auto-responses (yes, echo, printf) into commands instead of using non-interactive flags

tmux-notifications.description: Visual tmux indicators: red for attention, flash for prompts, reset on activity
